prompts:
how can I use sLidev ? I want to be able to easily create Databricks arch diagramns during my interview:  ⏺ That's Slidev — a developer-focused, markdown-based presentation tool built on Vue.js. The giveaways:

  - Top-right toolbar with the dotted navigation controls and keyboard shortcut icons (shift, arrow
  keys, etc.)
  - Bottom-right slide indicator dots (yellow = current slide)
  - The overall dark-themed, code-friendly aesthetic with a background image overlay

  Slidev is popular for technical talks since you write slides in Markdown and can embed live code, use
  Vue components, and style with UnoCSS/Tailwind.
